title: senecio grossidens
intro: Senecio grossidens, also known as the rough-leaved ragwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Senecio grossidens contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio grossidens are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
